title: City mobility policy brief deck
description: Create a policy deck for a public-sector decision audience.

question.query: Create a 10-12 slide policy brief deck for a city council evaluating a downtown congestion pricing pilot. The deck should define the policy goal, summarize the current congestion problem, compare at least two peer-city examples, present three policy options, analyze equity and small-business impacts, identify risks, propose an implementation roadmap, define success metrics, and end with a clear recommendation. Include at least one chart and one options table.
question.query_chinese: 为正在评估市中心拥堵收费试点的市议会，制作一份 10-12 页的政策简报 PPT。PPT 应定义政策目标，概述当前拥堵问题，比较至少两个同类城市案例，提出三个政策选项，分析公平性和小企业影响，识别风险，提出实施路线图，定义成功指标，并以明确建议收尾。至少包含一个图表和一个选项表格。
